sections.title: Every child deserves a future.
sections.subtitle: Together, we can build hope and provide care for vulnerable children.

sections.heading: Our Mission
sections.content: To provide a loving home where children are nurtured, cared for, and guided in faith, helping them grow into strong, independent, and God-centered lives.

programs.title: Faith & Spiritual Growth
programs.description: Nurturing hearts through prayer, guidance, and hope in God.

programs.title: Shelter & Care
programs.description: A safe, loving home with nutritious meals and constant care.

programs.title: Education
programs.description: Learning support and life skills to help children thrive.

programs.title: Community & Families
programs.description: Connecting children with the wider community.
